auth_gate.description: Login prompt or expired-session gate before the workspace loads.

workspace_shell.description: Top-level speech generation shell that confirms the app is ready.

narration_input.description: Editable narration text field used for approved script text.

voice_picker.description: Voice-selection control for choosing the approved narrator profile.

generate_button.description: Primary generation trigger for narration rendering.

download_button.description: Completed-output download action for narration assets.
